tasks.title: Add PointOfInterestTypeEnum to schemas package
tasks.description: Create the closed `PointOfInterestTypeEnum` (values BEACH, STADIUM, PARK, MUSEUM, PLAZA, MONUMENT, VIEWPOINT, NATURAL, OTHER — SCREAMING_SNAKE per codebase convention, mirroring `AccommodationTypeEnum`) plus its Zod wrapper, mirroring `packages/schemas/src/enums/amenity-type.enum.ts` + `.schema.ts` exactly (OQ-3). Files: `packages/schemas/src/enums/point-of-interest-type.enum.ts`, `packages/schemas/src/enums/point-of-interest-type.schema.ts`, edit `packages/schemas/src/enums/index.ts` barrel to export both. Unit tests: `packages/schemas/test/enums/point-of-interest-type.schema.test.ts` — valid enum values parse, invalid string rejected with `zodError.enums.pointOfInterestType.invalid` message key.

tasks.title: Add PointOfInterestTypePgEnum to Drizzle enums
tasks.description: Add a `pgEnum('point_of_interest_type_enum', enumToTuple(PointOfInterestTypeEnum))` export in `packages/db/src/schemas/enums.dbschema.ts`, mirroring the `AmenitiesTypePgEnum`/`ClientTypePgEnum` one-liners already there. This is the DB-side counterpart to T-001's Zod enum, consumed by the `points_of_interest.type` column. No new file. Unit tests: extend `packages/db/test/schemas/enums.dbschema.test.ts` (or create if none exists for this file) asserting the pgEnum's value tuple matches `PointOfInterestTypeEnum`'s values exactly.

tasks.title: Create points_of_interest Drizzle table schema
tasks.description: Create `packages/db/src/schemas/destination/point-of-interest.dbschema.ts` mirroring `attraction.dbschema.ts` structurally (id uuid PK, slug text UNIQUE not null, isBuiltin/isFeatured bool, displayWeight int default 50, lifecycleState via `LifecycleStatusPgEnum`, icon/description text nullable, full BaseModel audit block with user FKs onDelete set null, adminInfo jsonb) but WITHOUT a `name` column (OQ-2), plus the two POI-specific additions: `lat` and `long` as `doublePrecision()` NOT NULL (R-3: plain numeric, no JSONB/string), and `type` using T-002's `PointOfInterestTypePgEnum` NOT NULL. Indexes: unique on `slug`, index on `isFeatured`, index on `lifecycleState`, index on `type`. Add `pointsOfInterestRelations` (relations to the join table, many). Unit tests: `packages/db/test/schemas/destination/point-of-interest.dbschema.test.ts` verifying column definitions/nullability/defaults.

tasks.title: Create r_destination_point_of_interest join table schema
tasks.description: Create `packages/db/src/schemas/destination/r_destination_point_of_interest.dbschema.ts`, mirroring `r_destination_attraction.dbschema.ts` exactly: composite PK `(destinationId, pointOfInterestId)`, both uuid FKs `onDelete: 'cascade'`, a composite index and a reverse `pointOfInterestId` index, plus `one(destinations)`/`one(pointsOfInterest)` relations and the inverse `many(destinations)` relation labeled `destinationsWithPointOfInterest` (M2M per OQ-1). Unit tests: `packages/db/test/schemas/destination/r_destination_point_of_interest.dbschema.test.ts` verifying PK composition, cascade behavior config, and both indexes exist.

subtasks.title: Define composite PK + 2 FK columns with cascade

tasks.title: Export POI Drizzle schemas from db package barrel
tasks.description: Add `export * from './destination/point-of-interest.dbschema.js'` and the join-table equivalent to the db package's schema barrel (same file/pattern used for `attraction.dbschema.ts`'s export — locate it via the existing attraction export line). Confirm both new tables are visible to `drizzle-kit generate` by running `pnpm --filter @repo/db exec drizzle-kit check` (or the project's schema-drift check) locally. Unit tests: none new (covered by T-003/T-004); this task's own verification is the successful barrel export + a quick import smoke test asserting `pointsOfInterest` and `rDestinationPointOfInterest` tables are importable from `@repo/db`.

subtasks.title: Add barrel export lines for both new schema files
Verify tables importable from @repo/db package root

tasks.title: Generate and commit migration 0050 for POI tables
tasks.description: Run `pnpm db:generate` to produce the structural migration (expected `0050_*.sql`, mirroring `0048_glossy_psylocke.sql`'s shape: `CREATE TABLE points_of_interest`, `CREATE TABLE r_destination_point_of_interest`, `CREATE TYPE point_of_interest_type_enum`, FK constraints with `ON DELETE cascade`, unique index on slug, plus the other indexes from T-003/T-004). Commit the generated `.sql` file and its journal entry. Verify `pnpm env:check:registry`-style drift guard (the `db:generate` drift check referenced in AC-1) passes with no uncommitted schema diff. Apply locally via `pnpm db:migrate` against the worktree dev DB and confirm both tables exist. No new unit tests (migration SQL is generated, not hand-written) — verification is `pnpm db:migrate` succeeding + a manual `\d points_of_interest` / `\d r_destination_point_of_interest` check.

subtasks.title: Review generated 0050_*.sql for correctness vs 0048 template
Verify drift guard passes (no pending schema diff)

tasks.title: Create point-of-interest.schema.ts base Zod schema
tasks.description: Create `packages/schemas/src/entities/point-of-interest/point-of-interest.schema.ts` mirroring `attraction.schema.ts`'s `AttractionSchema` shape, but WITHOUT `name` (OQ-2) and WITH `lat`/`long`/`type` added: `slug` (string, regex `^[a-z0-9]+(?:[-_][a-z0-9]+)*$` per SPEC-266 underscore-allowing discipline, required — this is the i18n key), `lat` (number, min -90 max 90), `long` (number, min -180 max 180), `type` (`PointOfInterestTypeEnumSchema` from T-001, required), `icon`/`description` optional strings, `isBuiltin`/`isFeatured` bool default false, `displayWeight` int default 50, `lifecycleState`. Also add `PointOfInterestSummarySchema`/`PointOfInterestMiniSchema` via `.pick()`. Unit tests: `packages/schemas/test/entities/point-of-interest/point-of-interest.schema.test.ts` covering valid payload, lat/long out-of-range rejection, invalid slug rejection, missing `type` rejection, confirming no `name` field is accepted.

subtasks.title: Define PointOfInterestSchema with lat/long/type, no name
Write schema unit tests incl. lat/long range + slug regex edge cases

tasks.title: Create point-of-interest.crud.schema.ts
tasks.description: Create `packages/schemas/src/entities/point-of-interest/point-of-interest.crud.schema.ts` mirroring `attraction.crud.schema.ts`: Create/Update/Delete/Restore input+output schemas derived from T-007's `PointOfInterestSchema` via `.omit()`/`stripShapeDefaults(...).partial()`, plus `PointOfInterestAddToDestinationInputSchema`/`RemoveFromDestinationInputSchema`/`DestinationRelationOutputSchema` (mirroring the attraction relation-management input shapes, needed even though admin write routes are deferred — NG-5 — since the seed factory and relationship seed step both call these create/relation methods programmatically). Unit tests: `point-of-interest.crud.schema.test.ts` covering create input validation, update partial semantics, relation input shape.

tasks.title: Create point-of-interest.query.schema.ts
tasks.description: Create `packages/schemas/src/entities/point-of-interest/point-of-interest.query.schema.ts` mirroring `attraction.query.schema.ts`: `PointOfInterestFiltersSchema` (add a `type` filter on top of the attraction pattern), `PointOfInterestSearchSchema extends BaseSearchSchema`, list/search result item schemas, `HttpPointOfInterestSearchSchema`, and critically `DestinationIdsByPointOfInterestSlugsSchema` (`{ slugs: z.array(z.string()).min(1) }`, mirroring `DestinationIdsByAttractionSlugsSchema` exactly — this is the input contract T-020's `getDestinationIdsByPointOfInterestSlugs` service method and T-039's AI resolver both consume). Unit tests: `point-of-interest.query.schema.test.ts` covering filter/search parsing and the slugs-array min-length validation.

tasks.title: Create point-of-interest.http.schema.ts
tasks.description: Create `packages/schemas/src/entities/point-of-interest/point-of-interest.http.schema.ts` mirroring `attraction.http.schema.ts`: HTTP-coerced create/update/search schemas (query-string-safe versions of T-008/T-009's schemas, using the same `HttpQueryFields`-style coercion helpers as attraction) plus `httpToDomain*` mapper functions converting coerced HTTP input into domain input shapes. Unit tests: `point-of-interest.http.schema.test.ts` covering string-to-number coercion for `lat`/`long`/`displayWeight` query params and the httpToDomain mapper round-trip.

tasks.title: Create point-of-interest.access.schema.ts
tasks.description: Create `packages/schemas/src/entities/point-of-interest/point-of-interest.access.schema.ts` mirroring `attraction.access.schema.ts`: `PointOfInterestPublicSchema`/`ProtectedSchema`/`AdminSchema` tiers via `.pick()` on T-007's base schema (public tier excludes `adminInfo`/audit-by fields; all tiers include `lat`/`long`/`type` since coordinates are not sensitive). Unit tests: `point-of-interest.access.schema.test.ts` asserting each tier strips the expected fields.

tasks.title: Create point-of-interest.relations.schema.ts
tasks.description: Create `packages/schemas/src/entities/point-of-interest/point-of-interest.relations.schema.ts` mirroring `attraction.relations.schema.ts`: `DestinationPointOfInterestRelationSchema`, `PointOfInterestWithDestinationSchema`, bulk add/remove/reorder schemas, `BulkRelationOperationOutputSchema` (M2M per OQ-1, so a POI can list multiple destinationIds). Unit tests: `point-of-interest.relations.schema.test.ts` covering relation schema shape and bulk-operation output validation.

tasks.title: Create point-of-interest schemas barrel and wire package export
tasks.description: Create `packages/schemas/src/entities/point-of-interest/index.ts` as a plain `export * from` barrel of the 6 files from T-007/T-008/T-009/T-010/T-011/T-012, mirroring `attraction/index.ts`. Wire this barrel into `packages/schemas/src/entities/index.ts` (or wherever entity barrels are aggregated) so `@repo/schemas` exposes the full POI 6-file set (AC-2). Unit tests: a barrel smoke test asserting all expected named exports (`PointOfInterestSchema`, `PointOfInterestCreateInputSchema`, etc.) are importable from `@repo/schemas`.

tasks.title: Add PointOfInterest permission enum values
tasks.description: Add `POINT_OF_INTEREST_CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE/VIEW/RESTORE/LIFECYCLE_CHANGE/HARD_DELETE` and `DESTINATION_POINT_OF_INTEREST_MANAGE` to `packages/schemas/src/enums/permission.enum.ts` and register the `POINT_OF_INTEREST` category in `PermissionCategoryEnum`, following the documented 'Adding Missing Permissions' recipe in service-core's CLAUDE.md. DEVIATION NOTE (deliberate): unlike attraction's split-brain gate (route layer checks `ATTRACTION_*` while the service layer mostly checks `DESTINATION_*`), POI uses `POINT_OF_INTEREST_*` consistently at BOTH the service layer (T-018) and any future route layer — do not replicate attraction's inconsistency. Unit tests: extend `permission.enum.test.ts` (or equivalent) asserting the new values exist and are unique strings.

tasks.title: Create PointOfInterestModel
tasks.description: Create `packages/db/src/models/destination/point-of-interest.model.ts` mirroring `packages/db/src/models/destination/attraction.model.ts` (extends `BaseModel`, wires the `points_of_interest` Drizzle table from T-003, standard CRUD query builders). Unit tests: `packages/db/test/models/destination/point-of-interest.model.test.ts` mirroring `attraction.model.test.ts`'s coverage (create/find/update/soft-delete happy paths using the test DB harness).

subtasks.title: Wire points_of_interest table + standard query builders

tasks.title: Create RDestinationPointOfInterestModel
tasks.description: Create `packages/db/src/models/destination/rDestinationPointOfInterest.model.ts` mirroring `rDestinationAttraction.model.ts` exactly (join-table model over T-004's schema, composite-key CRUD helpers). Unit tests: `packages/db/test/models/destination/rDestinationPointOfInterest.model.test.ts` mirroring the attraction join model's test coverage (add/remove relation, list by destination, list by POI).

tasks.title: Create point-of-interest.normalizers.ts
tasks.description: Create `packages/service-core/src/services/point-of-interest/point-of-interest.normalizers.ts` mirroring `attraction.normalizers.ts`: `normalizeCreateInput`/`normalizeUpdateInput`/`normalizeListInput`/`normalizeViewInput` plus `normalizeAdminInfo`. Simpler than attraction's version since POI has no `name`-derived slug generation (slug is always provided by seed, not auto-generated) — mostly pass-through normalization. Unit tests: `packages/service-core/test/services/point-of-interest/point-of-interest.normalizers.test.ts` covering each normalizer function's identity/pass-through behavior and the adminInfo normalization edge case.

tasks.title: Create point-of-interest.permissions.ts
tasks.description: Create `packages/service-core/src/services/point-of-interest/point-of-interest.permissions.ts` with `checkCanCreatePointOfInterest`/`UpdatePointOfInterest`/`DeletePointOfInterest`/`ViewPointOfInterest`/`RestorePointOfInterest`/`AdminList` functions, ALL consistently checking `PermissionEnum.POINT_OF_INTEREST_*` from T-014 (per T-014's deviation note — do not split between `DESTINATION_*` and `POINT_OF_INTEREST_*` like attraction does). Public read access (view) should NOT require a permission (POIs are a public catalog, mirroring how public GET routes work today). Unit tests: `point-of-interest.permissions.test.ts` covering allow/deny per permission function with mocked actors.

tasks.title: Create PointOfInterestService core CRUD
tasks.description: Create `packages/service-core/src/services/point-of-interest/point-of-interest.service.ts`: `PointOfInterestService extends BaseCrudRelatedService<PointOfInterest, PointOfInterestModel, RDestinationPointOfInterestModel, ...>` mirroring `attraction.service.ts`'s core shape — `static ENTITY_NAME = 'pointOfInterest'`, `getDefaultListRelations()`, `getSearchableColumns()` returning `['slug', 'description']` (no `name` per OQ-2), the 12 standard `_can*` hooks wired to T-018's permission checks, `_canAdminList` override, `createDefaultRelatedModel()`, and `_executeSearch`/`_executeCount`/`searchForList` overrides. Relation/resolver methods (addPointOfInterestToDestination etc.) are T-020, NOT this task. Unit tests: `packages/service-core/test/services/point-of-interest/point-of-interest.service.test.ts` covering create/read/update/soft-delete/restore happy paths + permission-denied cases, mirroring `attraction.service.test.ts` structure.

subtasks.title: Write core CRUD service unit tests

tasks.title: Add relation and slug-resolution methods to PointOfInterestService
tasks.description: Add 5 public methods to `point-of-interest.service.ts` from T-019, mirroring attraction's equivalents: `addPointOfInterestToDestination`, `removePointOfInterestFromDestination`, `getPointsOfInterestForDestination`, `getDestinationsByPointOfInterest`, and `getDestinationIdsByPointOfInterestSlugs` (consumes T-009's `DestinationIdsByPointOfInterestSlugsSchema` — this is the AI-search and proximity-search entry point used by T-020's downstream consumers T-032 and T-039). Unit tests: extend `point-of-interest.service.test.ts` covering each relation method's happy path, the M2M case (one POI mapped to 2+ destinations), and `getDestinationIdsByPointOfInterestSlugs` with matched/unmatched slugs.

subtasks.title: Write relation + slug-resolution unit tests incl. M2M case

tasks.title: Create public POI API routes
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/src/routes/point-of-interest/public/{getById,getBySlug,list,index}.ts` mirroring `apps/api/src/routes/attraction/public/*.ts` exactly (using `createPublicListRoute`/equivalent factories, `PointOfInterestPublicSchema` from T-011, `PointOfInterestSearchHttpSchema` from T-010). Public read only per AC-5/§7 — no admin write routes (NG-5). Unit tests: `apps/api/test/routes/point-of-interest/public/*.test.ts` mirroring the attraction public route tests (200 list/getById/getBySlug happy paths, 404 for unknown slug).

tasks.title: Register POI routes in API app + route registration tests
tasks.description: Wire `pointOfInterestPublicRoutes` (T-021's `index.ts`) into the main Hono app's route registration (locate the file that mounts `attractionPublicRoutes` under `/api/v1/public/attractions` — same location, add `/api/v1/public/points-of-interest`). Update `apps/api/docs/route-architecture.md` reference table if it enumerates entities. Unit tests: an app-level integration test asserting `GET /api/v1/public/points-of-interest` returns 200 with the expected paginated shape (can be a thin smoke test alongside existing app-registration tests).

subtasks.title: Update route-architecture.md if entity table exists

tasks.title: Create seed data JSON fixtures for POIs
tasks.description: Create `packages/seed/src/data/pointOfInterest/*.json` (one file per POI, naming `NNN-point-of-interest-<slug>.json` mirroring attraction's `NNN-attraction-<slug>.json` convention). Author a curated initial set of 10-12 real Concepción del Uruguay / Litoral landmarks (e.g. autódromo, playa Banco Pelay, plaza principal, museums) covering all 9 `type` enum values at least once. Each fixture: `{ $schema, id, slug, lat, long, type, description?, icon?, isBuiltin: true, displayWeight, lifecycleState: 'ACTIVE' }` — NO `name` field (OQ-2). No unit tests for this task (pure data authoring); validation happens in T-024's seed factory run and T-030's i18n coverage test.

subtasks.title: Curate 10-12 real POIs covering all 9 type values
Write JSON fixtures with lat/long/type, no name field

tasks.title: Create pointsOfInterest.seed.ts required-seed factory
tasks.description: Create `packages/seed/src/required/pointsOfInterest.seed.ts` mirroring `attractions.seed.ts`'s `createSeedFactory({entityName: 'PointsOfInterest', serviceClass: PointOfInterestService, folder: 'src/data/pointOfInterest', files: requiredManifest.pointsOfInterest, normalizer, getEntityInfo})` — normalizer strips `$schema`/`id`/`lifecycleState` (keeps `slug` since it's the i18n key, unlike attraction which strips slug too... verify against T-023's fixture shape before stripping). Unit tests: `packages/seed/test/required/pointsOfInterest.seed.test.ts` mirroring the attraction seed factory test (loads fixtures, calls service.create, handles duplicate-slug idempotency).

tasks.title: Register pointsOfInterest in manifest-required.json and orchestrator
tasks.description: Add a `"pointsOfInterest": [...]` array entry to `packages/seed/src/data/manifest-required.json` listing every T-023 fixture filename, and wire `pointsOfInterest.seed.ts` (T-024) into the required-seed orchestrator that runs `--required` seed groups (locate where `attractions.seed.ts` is invoked, e.g. a `runRequiredSeeds` aggregator, and add the sibling call — order after destinations since the relationship seed in T-026 needs both). Unit tests: an orchestrator-level test asserting `pointsOfInterest` group is included in the `--required` run list.

subtasks.title: Wire seed factory into required-seed orchestrator

tasks.title: Add destination-POI relationship seed step
tasks.description: Add a `relationBuilder` on `packages/seed/src/required/destinations.seed.ts` for POIs, mirroring the existing attraction `relationBuilder` (via `createServiceRelationBuilder({serviceClass: PointOfInterestService, methodName: 'addPointOfInterestToDestination', extractIds: (d) => d.pointOfInterestIds || [], entityType: 'pointsOfInterest', relationType: 'pointsOfInterest', buildParams: (destinationId, pointOfInterestId) => ({destinationId, pointOfInterestId}), ...})`). Add a `pointOfInterestIds: string[]` array to at least 3-4 `destination/*.json` fixtures referencing T-023's seed-ids, including at least one POI mapped to 2 destinations (M2M coverage, OQ-1). Unit tests: `destinations.seed.test.ts` extension covering the relation builder wiring the join rows correctly, including the multi-destination POI case.

subtasks.title: Add pointOfInterestIds to 3-4 destination fixtures incl. one M2M case

tasks.title: Update seed dual-write guard for pointOfInterest path
tasks.description: Add `'^packages/seed/src/data/pointOfInterest/'` to the `REQUIRED_DATA_DIR_PATTERNS` array in `scripts/check-seed-dual-write.sh` (same array that already lists `amenity`/`attraction`/`destination` etc.), so future edits to T-023's fixtures are caught by the CI dual-write guard (R-5). Also add the new path to the prose list of guarded paths in `packages/seed/CLAUDE.md`. Unit tests: run `scripts/check-seed-dual-write.sh` locally against a dummy uncommitted fixture edit to confirm it now flags a missing data-migration for the `pointOfInterest` path.

subtasks.title: Verify guard fires on a dummy fixture edit

tasks.title: Write seed integration test for POI required group
tasks.description: Write an integration test (mirroring the existing attraction/destination seed integration test pattern, e.g. `packages/seed/test/integration/pointsOfInterest.seed.integration.test.ts`) that runs the `--required` seed pipeline against a test DB and asserts: (1) all T-023 POIs are present with correct `lat`/`long`/`type`/no-`name`; (2) the T-026 relationship rows exist in `r_destination_point_of_interest`, including the M2M case; (3) re-running the seed is idempotent (AC-3). This is the cross-component integration test — do NOT fold into T-024/T-026's unit tests.

subtasks.title: Assert POI rows + relationship rows including M2M case

tasks.title: Add POI i18n display strings (es/en/pt)
tasks.description: Add `destinations.poiNames.<slug>` display-name strings for every T-023 seeded POI slug, plus `destinations.poiTypeLabels.<TYPE_ENUM_VALUE>` labels for all 9 `PointOfInterestTypeEnum` values, to the `@repo/i18n` locale files across `es`/`en`/`pt` (mirror the exact `amenityNames`/nesting shape in `packages/i18n/src/locales/es/accommodations.json`, likely as a new `destinations.json` key block or appended to an existing destination-scoped locale file — verify the actual file destination-scoped strings live in before creating a new one). Add poiTypeLabels.<ENUM_VALUE> for all 9 types in es/en/pt

tasks.description: Write a test (e.g. `packages/i18n/test/point-of-interest-coverage.test.ts` or alongside the existing amenity/feature i18n-coverage test if one exists) that reads T-023/T-024's seeded POI slugs and asserts every slug has a `destinations.poiNames.<slug>` entry in ALL THREE locales (es/en/pt), and every `PointOfInterestTypeEnum` value has a `poiTypeLabels` entry in all three locales (R-6 mitigation, AC-7). This test must fail loudly if a future seed addition forgets its i18n string.

subtasks.title: Load seeded POI slugs from fixtures
Assert poiTypeLabels coverage across es/en/pt for all 9 enum values

tasks.title: Add poiId/poiSlug params to accommodation search schemas
tasks.description: Add optional `poiId`/`poiSlug` fields to `AccommodationSearchSchema`/`AccommodationFiltersSchema` (`packages/schemas/src/entities/accommodation/accommodation.query.schema.ts`, alongside the existing `latitude`/`longitude`/`radius` fields at lines ~53-55/105-107) and to the HTTP-coerced search schema (same file area line ~202-204, alongside `HttpQueryFields.latitude()`). Do not remove the existing lat/long/radius fields — both entry points coexist (T-034 handles precedence). Unit tests: extend `accommodation.query.schema.test.ts` covering `poiId`/`poiSlug` optional parsing and that providing neither is still valid (both remain optional).

subtasks.title: Add poiId/poiSlug to HTTP-coerced search schema
Write schema unit tests for new optional params

tasks.title: Implement resolvePoiToCoordinates helper
tasks.description: Implement `resolvePoiToCoordinates({ poiId?, poiSlug?, radius? }, ctx)` in a new `packages/service-core/src/services/accommodation/accommodation.poi-proximity.helper.ts`, calling `PointOfInterestService` (read-by-id or T-020's slug lookup path) to return `{ lat, long, radiusKm }` or a typed not-found error. NOTE (OQ-5, RESOLVED — see T-037/spec §11): `radiusKm = 5` is the owner-confirmed default when none is provided (no longer a placeholder). Unit tests: `accommodation.poi-proximity.helper.test.ts` covering found-by-id, found-by-slug, not-found, explicit-radius, and default-radius cases.

subtasks.title: Apply OQ-5 placeholder default radius (5km) when none given
Write resolution helper unit tests incl. not-found case

tasks.title: Wire resolved POI coordinates into accommodation search query
tasks.description: In `AccommodationService`'s search method, when `poiId`/`poiSlug` is present, call T-032's `resolvePoiToCoordinates` and feed the result into the EXISTING `latitude`/`longitude`/`radius` code path that already calls `buildWithinRadiusClause`/`buildDistanceOrderByExpr` in `accommodation.model.ts` (lines ~121/361) — per NG-2, write ZERO new distance SQL, purely reuse the existing geo.ts-backed path by populating the same params object it already consumes. Unit tests: extend `accommodation.service.test.ts` (or `.model.test.ts`) asserting that a `poiId` search produces IDENTICAL SQL/results to an equivalent direct `latitude`/`longitude`/`radius` search (NG-2 compliance assertion).

subtasks.title: Detect poiId/poiSlug in search params and resolve via T-032
Feed resolved lat/long/radius into existing geo.ts-backed query path
Write parity test: poiId search == equivalent lat/long/radius search

tasks.title: Add poiId/latitude precedence validation
tasks.description: In the search-param normalization step (near T-033's integration point), define and implement precedence when BOTH a POI reference (`poiId`/`poiSlug`) AND explicit `latitude`/`longitude` are provided in the same request: the resolved POI's coordinates take precedence (documented behavior, not a validation error) since a POI reference is a more specific intent signal. Unit tests: edge-case unit test asserting POI coordinates win over conflicting explicit lat/long, and that providing both `poiId` and `poiSlug` together is a 400 validation error (ambiguous single-entry-point contract).

tasks.title: Wire poiId/poiSlug through accommodation public search route
tasks.description: Confirm/update `apps/api/src/routes/accommodation/public/list.ts` (or the dedicated search route if separate) passes T-031's new `poiId`/`poiSlug` query params straight through to `AccommodationService.search()` unchanged (the route is already a thin wrapper per project convention — likely no route-layer code change needed beyond the schema already covering it via `requestQuery`). Unit tests: `apps/api/test/routes/accommodation/public/list.test.ts` extension — a request with `?poiSlug=<seeded-slug>` returns 200 with proximity-filtered results.

subtasks.title: Verify route schema wiring passes poiId/poiSlug through
Write route-level test with poiSlug query param

tasks.title: Write near-POI accommodation search integration test
tasks.description: Write an end-to-end integration test seeding (or using T-028's seeded fixtures) a real POI plus 2-3 accommodations at known distances, then asserting `GET /api/v1/public/accommodations?poiSlug=<slug>` returns results correctly ranked/filtered by distance to the POI (AC-4), and that an unknown `poiSlug` returns a clean 404/400 rather than a silent empty result. This is the cross-component AC-4 acceptance test.

subtasks.title: Seed accommodations at known distances from a seeded POI
Assert distance-ranked/filtered results for valid poiSlug
Assert clean error for unknown poiSlug

tasks.title: Document OQ-5 default radius resolution in spec.md
tasks.description: Append a resolution note to `.specs/HOS-113-points-of-interest/spec.md` §11 (mirroring the existing 'Resolved (owner, 2026-07-10)' banner format used for OQ-1/2/3/6) recording the OQ-5 outcome: default radius = 5km when none given (T-032's placeholder), confirmed or amended based on actual owner sign-off obtained during Phase 2 implementation. If the owner has NOT yet confirmed by the time this task is reached, surface that explicitly instead of silently marking it resolved.

subtasks.title: Confirm default radius value with owner

tasks.title: Create poi-allowlist.ts with matchPoiTerms
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/src/routes/ai/protected/poi-allowlist.ts` mirroring `attraction-allowlist.ts`: `POI_ALLOWLIST: Record<locale, Record<nlTerm, readonly string[]>>` curated statically from T-023/T-030's finalized seeded POI slugs (OQ-7 — cross-check every allowlist slug against real seed JSON per the HOS-111 T-009 lesson, R-4), plus a pure `matchPoiTerms(text, locale): readonly string[]` matcher (case-insensitive substring, dedup via Set, never invents a slug). Unit tests: `poi-allowlist.test.ts` mirroring `attraction-allowlist.test.ts` — match/no-match/dedup/case-insensitivity cases PLUS a static test asserting every allowlist slug exists in T-023's seed fixtures (R-4 defense).

subtasks.title: Curate POI_ALLOWLIST dict from seeded slugs (es/en/pt)

tasks.title: Create poi-resolver.ts
tasks.description: Create `apps/api/src/routes/ai/protected/poi-resolver.ts` mirroring `attraction-resolver.ts`'s `resolveAttractionConstraint`: `resolvePoiConstraint(matchedSlugs, existingLocationConstraint)` calls T-020's `PointOfInterestService.getDestinationIdsByPointOfInterestSlugs`, intersects the resulting destinationIds with any existing location constraint (same intersect-or-no-match rule as attraction), and returns a discriminated union including `{kind: 'no-match', poiSlugs}` and a resolved case exposing the matched POI's `{lat, long}` for T-042's proximity wiring. Unit tests: `poi-resolver.test.ts` mirroring `attraction-resolver.test.ts` cases (match, no-match, intersect-with-existing-constraint, empty allowlist).

subtasks.title: Expose resolved lat/long for downstream proximity use
Write resolver unit tests mirroring attraction-resolver.test.ts

tasks.title: Add poiSlugs slot to SearchIntentEntitiesSchema
tasks.description: Add `poiSlugs: z.array(z.string()).optional()` to `SearchIntentEntitiesSchema` in `packages/schemas/src/entities/ai/ai-search-intent.schema.ts` (line ~249, alongside the existing `attractionSlugs` field). Unit tests: extend `ai-search-intent.schema.test.ts` asserting `poiSlugs` parses as an optional string array.

subtasks.title: Write schema unit test for poiSlugs parsing

tasks.title: Wire POI allowlist into search-chat.prompt.ts
tasks.description: In `apps/api/src/routes/ai/protected/search-chat.prompt.ts`'s `buildAllowlistLines(locale)`, add a POI instruction line following the same pattern as the amenity/feature/attraction lines: flatten T-038's `POI_ALLOWLIST[locale]` values into a deduped slug list and append `Allowed destination point-of-interest slugs for this request (...): <slugs>` (mirroring the attraction line's wording). Unit tests: extend `search-chat.prompt.test.ts` asserting the POI allowlist line is present and correctly flattened/deduped for a given locale.

subtasks.title: Add POI allowlist flattening + line to buildAllowlistLines
Write prompt-building unit test for POI line

tasks.title: Wire poi-resolver into search-chat handler
tasks.description: In `apps/api/src/routes/ai/protected/search-chat.ts`, alongside the existing `resolveAttractionConstraint` call (~line 79/539), add a parallel call to T-039's `resolvePoiConstraint` using T-040's `validatedEntities.poiSlugs ?? []`. When a POI resolves, feed its `{lat, long}` into T-033's proximity search path (same params object accommodation search already consumes) instead of/alongside any attraction-based location constraint. Unit tests: extend `search-chat.test.ts` (or add an integration test) covering: a message resolving a POI applies proximity filtering; an unmatched POI mention is silently ignored (no hallucinated slug, R-4).

subtasks.title: Feed resolved POI lat/long into accommodation proximity search path
Write handler unit tests: matched + unmatched POI cases

tasks.title: Add poiSlugs to ai-search-chat.schema.ts response typing
tasks.description: Add a `poiSlugs: z.array(z.string())` property (with JSDoc mirroring the existing `attractionSlugs` doc comment at line ~82-89) to `packages/schemas/src/entities/ai/ai-search-chat.schema.ts`'s response schema, documenting the canonical POI slugs the assistant resolved for this request. Unit tests: extend `ai-search-chat.schema.test.ts` asserting the field parses correctly and defaults sensibly when empty.

subtasks.title: Add poiSlugs field + JSDoc to ai-search-chat.schema.ts

tasks.title: Write AI chat POI resolution integration test
tasks.description: Write an end-to-end integration test sending a natural-language chat message mentioning a seeded POI by name/alias (e.g. "cerca del autódromo") through the AI search-chat pipeline, asserting: the response's `poiSlugs` includes the correctly resolved slug (AC-6); the underlying accommodation search applied proximity filtering using the POI's coordinates (reusing T-036's near-POI assertions); an unresolvable landmark mention produces empty `poiSlugs` with no hallucinated slug and no crash.

subtasks.title: Send NL message mentioning a seeded POI, assert resolved poiSlugs
Assert proximity filtering applied using POI coordinates
Assert unresolvable mention yields empty poiSlugs, no hallucination

tasks.title: Add DestinationModel.getPointsOfInterestMap
tasks.description: Add `getPointsOfInterestMap(destIds: readonly string[], tx?: DrizzleClient): Promise<Map<string, Array<{id, slug, lat, long, type, icon, displayWeight}>>>` to `packages/db/src/models/destination/destination.model.ts`, mirroring `getAttractionsMap`'s exact shape: single query, `innerJoin(pointsOfInterest, eq(rDestinationPointOfInterest.pointOfInterestId, pointsOfInterest.id))`, `.orderBy(desc(pointsOfInterest.displayWeight))`, grouped into a `Map` keyed by `destinationId`. Unit tests: `destination.model.test.ts` extension mirroring `getAttractionsMap`'s test coverage (empty map, single destination, multiple destinations, M2M POI appearing under 2 destinationIds).

subtasks.title: Write unit tests incl. M2M multi-destination case

tasks.title: Add DestinationService._withPointsOfInterest hydration
tasks.description: Add a private `_withPointsOfInterest(destination, ctx?)` method to `packages/service-core/src/services/destination/destination.service.ts`, mirroring `_withAttractions` exactly (skip-if-already-hydrated guard, calls T-045's `getPointsOfInterestMap`, merges `pointsOfInterest` onto the destination object). Wire it into the same call sites as `_withAttractions` (`getBySlug`/`getByPath`, ~lines 1472/1498/639). Unit tests: extend `destination.service.test.ts` covering hydration on empty/populated/already-hydrated cases and that `getBySlug` returns `pointsOfInterest` in its result.

tasks.title: Add pointsOfInterest field to Destination Zod schema
tasks.description: Add an optional `pointsOfInterest: z.array(PointOfInterestWithDestinationSchema).optional()`-style field (using T-012's relations schema) to the destination entity's relations/aggregate schema, mirroring however `attractions` is typed on `DestinationSchema` today, so T-046's hydrated shape is properly typed end-to-end for API responses and web consumption. Unit tests: schema unit test asserting a destination payload with `pointsOfInterest` populated parses correctly.

subtasks.title: Add pointsOfInterest field to destination relations schema
Write schema unit test for hydrated shape

tasks.title: Create DestinationPOISection.astro component
tasks.description: Create `apps/web/src/components/destination/DestinationPOISection.astro` (build fresh, do NOT resurrect dead `DestinationAttractionsGrid.astro` per §6.4 — though its `displayWeight`-then-alphabetical sort + card shape is a useful reference). Renders a list/grid of a destination's POIs: i18n display name (via T-050's label helper), `type`/`icon`, optional `description`, ordered by `displayWeight` then name, featured-first (§8). Section is hidden entirely when the POI list is empty (guarded like attractions). Vanilla CSS Modules per web app conventions (NOT Tailwind). Unit tests: a component test (whatever pattern the web app uses for Astro component tests, e.g. Playwright/testing-library-astro) covering: renders N POIs sorted correctly, hidden when empty, i18n label resolution.

subtasks.title: Build DestinationPOISection.astro list/grid markup + CSS module

tasks.title: Wire DestinationPOISection into destination detail page
tasks.description: In `apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/destinos/[...path].astro`, cast/consume `dest.pointsOfInterest` (mirroring how `dest.attractions` is cast at line ~101-109) and render T-048's `<DestinationPOISection pointsOfInterest={pois} />` in the page body (not the header, since attractions use the header badge slot but POIs are a full list section per §8). Unit tests: page-level test verifying the section renders when a destination has POIs and is absent when it does not.

tasks.title: Create POI type-label i18n resolution helper
tasks.description: Create a small helper (e.g. `apps/web/src/utils/poi-type-label.ts` or alongside existing similar helpers in `@repo/i18n`) that maps a `PointOfInterestTypeEnum` value to its T-029 `destinations.poiTypeLabels.<value>` i18n string for the current locale, with a safe fallback (raw enum value, not a crash) if a label is somehow missing. Used by T-048's component. Unit tests: unit test covering all 9 enum values resolve correctly per locale, plus the missing-label fallback path.

subtasks.title: Implement poi type -> i18n label resolution helper
Write unit tests for all 9 types + fallback case

tasks.title: Write destination detail POI rendering integration test
tasks.description: Write an integration/E2E test (whatever pattern the web app's existing destination-detail tests use) loading a seeded destination known to have POIs (from T-026's fixtures) and asserting: the POI section renders with correct i18n display names and type labels in es/en/pt (AC-5, AC-7); a destination with no POIs renders no section at all. This is the cross-component acceptance test for Phase 4.

subtasks.title: Load seeded destination with POIs, assert section renders correctly
Assert i18n names/labels correct across es/en/pt
Assert no-POI destination renders no section

tasks.title: Document POI entity in CLAUDE.md Common Gotchas
tasks.description: Add a short entry to the root `CLAUDE.md` 'Common Gotchas' section (mirroring the existing 'Amenity/feature catalog (SPEC-266)' entry's style) documenting: POI has no `name` column (i18n by slug, `destinations.poiNames.<slug>`), plain numeric `lat`/`long` columns (not JSONB/string like accommodations/destinations), M2M to destinations via `r_destination_point_of_interest`, seed-only in Phase 1 (no admin CRUD yet), and the deferred multi-marker map / admin CRUD follow-up (NG-3/NG-5). No new tests — documentation-only task closing out Phase 4.

subtasks.title: Add POI entry to CLAUDE.md Common Gotchas

summary.notes: Phase 1 (T-001..T-030) COMPLETE. Phase 2 (proximity search, T-031..T-037) COMPLETE -- poiId/poiSlug params, resolvePoiToCoordinates (OQ-5 default radius 5km, owner-confirmed), search wiring + precedence, route wiring, AC-4 integration test, spec.md OQ-5 resolution. Phase 3 (AI search, T-038..T-044) COMPLETE -- poi-allowlist.ts + matchPoiTerms (12 seeded slugs, es/en/pt, seed-cross-check test), poi-resolver.ts (resolvePoiConstraint mirroring attraction's intersect-or-no-match + primary-POI lat/long), poiSlugs intent slot, buildAllowlistLines wiring, search-chat handler wiring (overwrites latitude/longitude/radius on match, reuses existing geo.ts path -- NG-2), poiSlugs on AiSearchChatFiltersEventSchema, AC-6 acceptance test, spec.md OQ-7 resolution. Phase 4 (destination detail web, T-045+) not started.
